title: astropanax stolzii
intro: Astropanax stolzii, also known as the Devil's claw or Grapple plant, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Menispermaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits associated with Astropanax stolzii include relief from pain, reduction of inflammation, and improvement of digestive issues. Astropanax stolzii can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
